race.description: Quest Echuca Serviced Apartments C,G&E BM56 Hcp
race.comment: WILD SENSATION (2) has raced well all prep and is bursting to win one. Travelled handy but struggled late under a huge weight over 1483m at Kyneton last start. Won't mind coming back in trip and the 3kgs off is significant. Gets his chance. KILMER (5) started favourite and had to call on all reserves to get the prize when resuming over 1200m at Swan Hill last time out. The stable tinkers with the gear in the hope of holding that form which hasn't always happened. Big chance again. CASH CONVERTER (3) has been in the money at both runs this prep, the latest here in a similar race to this 25 days ago. Doesn't win out of turn but his top three strike-rate is impressive. MOONBOLT (4) found 1200m at Pakenham a bit sharp when fresh from a spell recently. Will find this a shade easier and an extra 100m helps. BOULDER JACK (12) disappointed last start but with an uncontested lead he might run a cheeky race.
